ROS2_launch_file_config.description: ROS2 Launch File Config in CMakeLists.txt

Add Executable in CMake.description: Add an executable target in CMakeLists.txt

Ament Target Dependencies.description: Add dependencies to ament library or executable target

Install Targets.description: Install targets to the specified destination directory

body: DEPENDENCIES geometry_msgs # Add packages that above messages depend on, in this case geometry_msgs for Sphere.msg
